basis: The user wants searchable notes and a weekly themes report. One KB-focused starter agent is enough for day one.

recommended_agents.role: Ingest local notes, maintain source registry, and verify search quality.
recommended_agents.why: The desired outcome depends on clean local knowledge ingestion before adding automation or project management.
recommended_agents.first_task: Ingest the selected notes folder privately and write a first themes report.

alternatives_considered: project-manager-agent can wait until themes become tasks
automation-builder-agent can wait until the ingestion path is stable
